name: LearnStack
tagline: Launch your online academy without the monthly tax
metaDescription: LearnStack replaces Teachable with a complete course platform built into AppBuster. Host courses, manage students, and sell knowledge — saving $1,788/year.
heroSvg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><text x="50" y="70" text-anchor="middle" font-size="60">🎓</text></svg>

features.title: Course Builder
features.desc: Drag-and-drop curriculum editor with support for video, text, quizzes, and downloadable resources. Organize content into modules and lessons with flexible drip scheduling.

features.title: Video Hosting
features.desc: Upload and stream course videos with adaptive bitrate playback. No third-party hosting fees — videos are stored and delivered directly from your AppBuster instance.

features.title: Quizzes & Certificates
features.desc: Create graded assessments with multiple question types. Automatically issue branded completion certificates when students pass your requirements.

features.title: Payment Processing
features.desc: Sell courses with one-time payments, subscriptions, or payment plans. Built-in checkout with coupon codes and affiliate tracking out of the box.

features.title: Student Management
features.desc: Track enrollment, progress, and completion rates across your entire student body. Segment students by course, cohort, or engagement level for targeted communication.

features.title: Community Forums
features.desc: Built-in discussion boards per course so students can ask questions, share progress, and support each other. Moderate conversations without leaving the platform.
